message:
fix(config): nest default export_dir under ~/.mcp_agent_mail

The default export directory was resolving to ~/exports instead of
~/.mcp_agent_mail/exports, placing bundles in an unexpected top-level
location.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -902,7 +902,9 @@ impl Default for Config {
             tui_ambient: "subtle".to_string(),
             tui_debug: false,
             export_dir: resolve_data_path(
-                &dirs::home_dir().unwrap_or_else(|| PathBuf::from(".")),
+                &dirs::home_dir()
+                    .unwrap_or_else(|| PathBuf::from("."))
+                    .join(".mcp_agent_mail"),
                 "exports",
             ),
             tui_tree_style: "rounded".to_string(),
